[[af:Houthond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sáe̤k]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[hak:Kap-sut]][[ja:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[nds:Holt-Hund]][[vi:Giáp Tuất]][[za:Gyapswt]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sut]][[zh-yue:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]]

'''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 11th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yin Water Rooster]] and followed by [[Yin Wood Pig]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Kinoe (甲)]] represents yang [[Wood (wuxing)|Wood (木)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Dog (zodiac)|Dog (戌)]] represents yang [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], establishing a restraining relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)]]) (Wood overcomes Earth). 
==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Wood Dog (甲戌)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 seot1
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-inu
***Onyomi 1: kokuju
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap sul (갑술)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Tuất

==Years of Yang Wood Dog==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 14 when divided by 60 is a [[Year|year]] of 甲戌.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Wood Dog (甲戌)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 14|14 AD]]
* [[AD 74|74 AD]]
* [[AD 134|134 AD]]
* [[194|194 AD]]
* [[254|254 AD]]
* [[314|314 AD]]
* [[374|374 AD]]
* [[434|434 AD]]
* [[494|494 AD]]
* [[554|554 AD]]
* [[614|614 AD]]
* [[674|674 AD]]
* [[734|734 AD]]
* [[794|794 AD]]
* [[854|854 AD]]
* [[914|914 AD]]
* [[974|974 AD]]
|
* [[1034|1034 AD]]
* [[1094|1094 AD]]
* [[1154|1154 AD]]
* [[1214|1214 AD]]
* [[1274|1274 AD]]
* [[1334|1334 AD]]
* [[1394|1394 AD]]
* [[1454|1454 AD]]
* [[1514|1514 AD]]
* [[1574|1574 AD]]
* [[1634|1634 AD]]
* [[1694|1694 AD]]
* [[1754|1754 AD]]
* [[1814|1814 AD]]
* [[1874|1874 AD]]
* [[1934|1934 AD]]
* [[1994|1994 AD]]
|
* [[2054 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2114 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2174 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2234 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2294 AD]]
* [[2354 AD]]
* [[2414 AD]]
* [[25th century|2474 AD]]
* [[2534 AD]]
* [[2594 AD]]
* [[2654 AD]]
* [[2714 AD]]
* [[2774 AD]]
* [[2834 AD]]
* [[2894 AD]]
* [[2954 AD]]
|}
==Months of Yang Wood Dog==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Kinoe (甲)]] or [[Tsuchinoto (己)]]), the month of [[September]] is designated as the [[Month|month (calendar)]] of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the [[Solar term]] (from [[Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Dog==
The [[Senjitsu]] for 甲戌 is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of [[Tsuchi (Japanese term)|Large Earth]].

==See Also==

{{wikidata link|Q1062917}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
